title: The Swamp Ordeal — Part 5
description: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Enel, Wyper, Nami. Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: to what we lost 400 years ago...

summary: Chopper faces one of Enel’s priests and learns how terrifying the sky warriors’ dials and mantra can be.
